records.question: Which mountains named Mawenzi (Hans Meyer Pk) in Tanzania are exactly 5148.0 meters high with a prominence of 850.0 and were climbed by Georg Auerbacher who scored exactly 5.0 points?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.mountain_id FROM mountain
JOIN climber ON mountain.mountain_id = climber.mountain_id
WHERE mountain.name = 'Mawenzi (Hans Meyer Pk)' AND mountain.height = 5148.0 AND mountain.prominence = 850.0 AND climber.name = 'Georg Auerbacher' AND mountain.country = 'Tanzania' AND climber.points = 5.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT mountain.Mountain_ID 
FROM mountain 
JOIN climber ON mountain.Mountain_ID = climber.Mountain_ID 
WHERE mountain.Name = 'Mawenzi (Hans Meyer Pk)' 
AND mountain.Height = 5148.0 
AND mountain.Prominence = 850.0 
AND climber.Name = 'Georg Auerbacher' 
AND climber.Points = 5.0

records.question: Which mountains in Tanzania's Kilimanjaro range have a prominence of 850.0 that were climbed by Georg Auerbacher from West Germany who scored exactly 5.0 points with a time of 1:18.14.6?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.mountain_id FROM mountain
JOIN climber ON mountain.mountain_id = climber.mountain_id
WHERE mountain.country = 'Tanzania' AND climber.time = '1:18.14.6' AND climber.name = 'Georg Auerbacher' AND climber.country = 'West Germany' AND climber.points = 5.0 AND mountain.prominence = 850.0 AND mountain.range = 'Kilimanjaro'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT mountain.Mountain_ID 
FROM mountain 
JOIN climber ON mountain.Mountain_ID = climber.Mountain_ID 
WHERE mountain.Range = 'Kilimanjaro' 
AND mountain.Prominence = 850.0 
AND climber.Name = 'Georg Auerbacher' 
AND climber.Country = 'West Germany' 
AND climber.Points = 5.0 
AND climber.Time = '1:18.14.6'
